# Mosey

> A web execution CLI for AI agents. Navigate, read, act, and observe — from bash. No pixels, no screenshots, no wasted compute.

## Docs

- [Quickstart](https://docs.mosey.dev/quickstart.md): Install and first commands
- [Commands: navigate](https://docs.mosey.dev/commands/navigate.md): Load a URL
- [Commands: state](https://docs.mosey.dev/commands/state.md): Get semantic tree with ref IDs
- [Commands: do](https://docs.mosey.dev/commands/do.md): Click, type, select by ref ID
- [Commands: diff](https://docs.mosey.dev/commands/diff.md): See what changed
- [Commands: session](https://docs.mosey.dev/commands/session.md): Save/load browser sessions
- [Architecture](https://docs.mosey.dev/concepts/architecture.md): Engine, CLI, and viewer
- [Sessions](https://docs.mosey.dev/concepts/sessions.md): Persistent browser state
- [For Agents](https://docs.mosey.dev/concepts/for-agents.md): Integration guide

## Quick Reference

```
mosey navigate <url>              # load a page → {url, title, status}
mosey state                       # semantic tree → {url, title, tree: [...]}
mosey do <ref> [--value "text"]   # interact → {success, action, ref}
mosey diff                        # what changed → {changes: [...], network: [...]}
mosey session save|load|list      # persist browser state
mosey stop                        # kill background engine
```

All output is JSON to stdout. Compose with jq, grep, pipes.
